selection: highest Phase-5 ell^2 record within each polarization type; ties prefer larger logical image then lexicographically earliest stable ID
tangent_coordinates: SVD-orthonormalized effective Sp(A)/U(G) tangent; dimension g(g+1)
distance: RMS affine-invariant SPD distance ||log(G0^-1/2 G1 G0^-1/2)||_F/sqrt(2g)
surrogate: fixed Matern-5/2 Gaussian process, length scale 0.65
adaptive_resampling: only the preregistered Bayesian UCB choices
claim_boundary: adversarial numerical search, not exhaustive local or global certification
